---
title: "The influence of the opposite sex on hypothetical aggressive inclinations"
authors: "Mason, K., Barlett, C., & Jones, A. L."
year: 2017
date: 2017-01-01
pub-journal: "Journal of Interpersonal Violence"
volume: "088626051772483"
doi: "10.1177/0886260517724831"
pdf: "assets/papers/2017/mason_etal_2017.pdf"
categories: [other]
---
